subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1900
subcodes.first_line: God has created all things in such a manner that they have always two conditions -- the condition of perfection and the condition of imperfection.
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @twofold; threefold station of the Manifestation of God, @literal interpretation, @need for an educator, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @Manifestation of God as mediator
